meta.purpose: Small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, same-event current rows, and record-marker interpretation stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

primarySourcesChecked: HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press F/G result PDF opened from HPA official top-page link
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF opened from HPA official top-page link
Exact-name web searches scoped to HPA, JPA, IPF/Goodlift, APF/AAPF, powerlifting, and bench press terms
batchScope.openPrCheck: No open Numata athlete research PRs were found before this batch. This continues after Lot 86-90.
batchScope.writeScope: Research log only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes.
